info.title: Prisma Postgres Management API
info.description: REST API for managing Prisma Postgres projects, databases, backups, and workspaces.

tags.name: [Experimental]
tags.description: Experimental endpoints are in active development and may change at any time without notice.

200.description: Returns the list of compute services.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

get.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Returns all compute services the token has access to, ordered by creation time (oldest first). Optionally filter by project ID. Supports cursor-based pagination.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Project not found.

422.description: Validation failed (e.g. missing projectId, empty display name, or invalid region).

post.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Creates a new compute service under the specified project. The `projectId` is required in the request body. The service is placed in the given region (or the default region if omitted).

200.description: Compute version retrieved.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute version not found.

get.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Returns a compute version by ID, including its current status derived from the underlying VM state.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute version not found.

409.description: The compute version must be stopped before it can be deleted.

delete.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Permanently deletes the compute version, its metadata, and any associated VM. The version must be stopped or in the `new` state before it can be deleted.

200.description: Start request accepted. The preview domain is returned immediately.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute version not found.

409.description: The compute version is in a state that does not allow starting (e.g. artifact not uploaded, or already running).

post.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Requests VM creation and startup for the compute version. The artifact must be uploaded before calling this endpoint. Returns a preview domain that becomes reachable once the VM is running. Poll the status endpoint until `running` is reached.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute version not found.

409.description: The compute version must be running or provisioning to be stopped.

post.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Requests VM shutdown for the compute version. The version record and metadata are retained. Poll the status endpoint until `stopped` is reached.

200.description: Compute service retrieved.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute service not found.

get.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Returns a compute service by ID, including its region and latest version reference.

200.description: Compute service updated.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute service not found.

patch.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Updates the display name of a compute service.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute service not found.

409.description: The compute service has active versions that must be stopped first.

delete.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Deletes a compute service. All compute versions under the service must already be stopped or deleted.

200.description: Returns the list of compute versions.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute service not found.

get.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Returns all compute versions belonging to a compute service, ordered by creation time (newest first). Supports cursor-based pagination.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute service not found.

422.description: Validation failed (e.g. `skipCodeUpload` on the first version).

post.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Creates a new compute version under the specified compute service. Returns a pre-signed upload URL for the artifact unless `skipCodeUpload` is set (which forks the latest version's artifact). Environment variables are merged with the previous version's variables when one exists.

200.description: Returned list of connections.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

get.description: Returns all connections the actor has access to, with optional database filter.

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

post.description: Creates a new connection for the specified database.

200.description: Returned the connection.

404.description: Connection with the given ID was not found.

get.description: Returns the connection with the given ID.

404.description: Connection with the given ID was not found.

delete.description: Deletes the connection with the given ID.

200.description: Rotated connection credentials.

404.description: Connection with the given ID was not found.

post.description: Generates new credentials for the connection with the given ID. Revocation of the previous credentials is best-effort.

200.description: Returns the list of databases.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

403.description: Actor does not have access to the requested databases.

get.description: Returns all databases the token has access to. Optionally filter by project ID.

403.description: Actor does not have access to the specified project.

404.description: Project not found.

post.description: Creates a new database in the specified project.

projectId.description: ID of the project to create the database in

region.description: Region for the database. Use "inherit" to use the project default database region.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default database

200.description: Returned the database with the given ID.

403.description: Actor does not have access to the database.

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

get.description: Returns the database with the given ID.

200.description: Updated the database.

403.description: Actor does not have access to the database.

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

patch.description: Updates the database with the given ID.

name.description: New display name for the database

403.description: Cannot delete the default environment.

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

delete.description: Deletes the database with the given ID.

200.description: Returned all connections for the given database.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

get.description: Returns all connections for the given database.

200.description: Created a new connection string for the database.

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

post.description: Creates a new connection string for the given database.

200.description: Returned backups for the given database.

id.description: The unique identifier for this backup

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the backup was created

size.description: Total file size (in bytes) of gzipped backup files

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

422.description: Remote database backups are not supported

get.description: Returns backups for the specified database.

200.description: Database restore initiated. The database status will be "recovering" until the restore completes.

404.description: Target database, source database, or backup not found.

409.description: Target database is currently provisioning or recovering and cannot be restored.

422.description: Invalid source type, backup not usable, or target is a default database.

post.description: Replaces the data in an existing database from a backup. Connections and credentials are preserved — only the data layer is replaced. Cannot be used on default databases.

databaseId.description: ID of the database the backup belongs to

backupId.description: ID of the backup to restore from

200.description: Returned usage metrics for the given database.

404.description: Database with the given ID was not found.

schema.description: Start date for metrics query. Defaults to start of current month if not provided.
End date for metrics query. Will be set to end of day if a future date is provided. Defaults to current date if not provided.

get.description: Returns usage metrics for the specified database.

200.description: Returns the list of projects.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

get.description: Returns the list of projects the token has access to.

post.summary: Create project with a postgres database
post.description: Creates a new project with a postgres database.

400.description: Project cannot be deleted due to existing dependencies.

404.description: Project with the specified ID was not found

delete.description: Deletes the project with the given ID.

200.description: Project retrieved.

404.description: Project with the specified ID was not found.

get.description: Returns the project with the given ID.

200.description: Project updated.

403.description: Actor does not have access to the project.

404.description: Project with the specified ID was not found.

patch.description: Updates the project with the given ID.

404.description: Project with the given ID was not found.

post.description: Transfer the project with the given ID to the new owner's workspace

200.description: Returns the list of compute services.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Project not found.

get.summary: List compute services for a project
get.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Returns all compute services belonging to a project, ordered by creation time (oldest first). Supports cursor-based pagination.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Project not found.

422.description: Validation failed (e.g. missing displayName, empty display name, or invalid region).

post.description:
⚠️ Experimental endpoint: this API is in active development and may change at any time without notice. ⚠️

Creates a new compute service under the specified project. The service is placed in the given region (or the default region if omitted).

200.description: Returned the databases for the given project ID.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

404.description: Project with the given ID was not found.

get.description: Returns databases for the given project.

201.description: Created a new database for the project.

400.description: The request is invalid due to missing or invalid parameters.

403.description: Project does not belong to the service token’s workspace.

post.description: Creates a new database for the given project.

backupId.description: The unique identifier for this backup

200.description: Returned the integrations for the given workspace.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

get.description: Returns integrations filtered by workspace ID.

200.description: Returned the integration.

404.description: Integration with the given ID was not found.

get.description: Returns a single integration by its ID.

404.description: Integration with the given ID was not found.

delete.description: Revokes the integration tokens by integration ID.

200.description: Returned the integrations for the given workspace ID.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

404.description: Workspace with the given ID was not found.

get.description: Returns integrations for the given workspace.

404.description: Integration with the given client ID was not found.

delete.description: Revokes the integration tokens with the given client ID.

200.description: Returns all available regions.

get.description: Returns all available regions across products. Optionally filter by product.

200.description: Returns all available regions for Prisma Postgres.

get.description: Returns all available regions for Prisma Postgres.

200.description: Returns all available regions for Prisma Accelerate.

get.description: Returns all available regions for Prisma Accelerate.

Returns all compute versions the token has access to, ordered by creation time (newest first). Optionally filter by compute service ID. Supports cursor-based pagination.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to access this resource.

404.description: Compute service not found.

422.description: Validation failed (e.g. missing computeServiceId, `skipCodeUpload` on the first version, or missing workspace context).

200.description: Returns the list of workspaces the current token can access.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to paginate

get.description: Returns the list of workspaces the current token can access.

200.description: Workspace retrieved.

404.description: Workspace with the specified ID was not found.

get.description: Returns the workspace with the given ID.
